CONTENT.Career: Maina made his professional debut for Hannover 96 on 18 March 2018, coming on as a substitute for Marvin Bakalorz on matchday 27 of the 2017–18 season of the Bundesliga in a 0–1 away loss against Borussia Dortmund.On 19 May 2022, it was announced that Maina would join Bundesliga side 1. FC Köln for the 2022–23 season on a free transfer. He signed a contract with the team until 2025.
CONTENT.Personal life: Maina was born in Berlin to a Kenyan father and a German mother.
CONTENT.External links: Linton Maina at DFB (also available in German)Linton Maina at kicker (in German)

SUMMARY: Linton Maina (born 23 June 1999) is a German professional footballer who plays as an attacking midfielder for Bundesliga club 1. FC Köln.
